title: Metals fall sharply amid a broader risk off across markets
section_path: Metals fall sharply amid a broader risk off across markets
section_path_text: Metals fall sharply amid a broader risk off across markets
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
A broad risk-off tone across markets saw commodities start the week under further pressure. Precious and industrial metals led the complex lower as the USD weighed on investor appetite. Gold fell the most in three months as rampant inflation raised the prospect of aggressive monetary tightening by the US Federal Reserve.
